findings.heuristic_flag: MBD4 tier=HEURISTIC (Zeta_Protocol_Inference, no external validation) - candidate for SAS/EGA outcome grounding
findings.prophet_note: Prophet logit coefficients PENDING_REAL_DATA (simulation-derived, anchored Colomban 2023). Zeta EGA+SAS outcomes are the real-data path.
findings.integrity_note: MFAP4 excluded from routed genes: its only entry is an explicit NOT-addressable placeholder (GSE63885 external GEO, out of Zeta scope). Verified absent from MSK CNA+MAF.

session3_sas_update.summary: SAS PDS clinical warehouse EXTRACTED (was inventory-only). Gene-outcome routing re-evaluated against real data.

KRAS.note: Patient-level KRAS genotype extracted; ~43% mutant matches known ~40% CRC prevalence. Minted as biomarker:kras:colorectal + stratified_by_biomarker edges. This is a REAL gene->trial link.

BRAF_KRAS_NRAS_logit.reason: W1 previously routed BRAF/KRAS/NRAS to 'SAS PDS outcomes -> replace simulation-derived logit coeffs with real outcome fit'. SAS trials carry NO survival-TIME column (only vital status) and are solid tumors, not ovarian. Cannot fit ovarian gene-outcome logit from SAS. Route NOT fulfilled for logit calibration; KRAS presence is CRC-only.

not_addressable_unchanged: MFAP4 (GSE63885 external GEO, out of Zeta scope)
findings.honest_note: The extracted clinical layer adds patient/arm/AE/safety content but is NOT gene-annotated except KRAS in 2 CRC trials. It does not ground the ovarian Prophet logit coefficients. No overclaim.
